'''fawomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uvulatomy|uvulatomy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-w-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uvulatomy|uvulatomy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fawomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæwemeth|fæwemeth]] || [[word:fæwemej|fæwemej]] || [[word:fæwemesh|fæwemesh]] || [[word:fæweme|fæweme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fawowomoth|fawowomoth]] || [[word:fawowomoj|fawowomoj]] || [[word:fawowomosh|fawowomosh]] || [[word:fawowomo|fawowomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fawomoth|fawomoth]] || [[word:fawomoj|fawomoj]] || [[word:fawomosh|fawomosh]] || [[word:fawomo|fawomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fawofmoth|fawofmoth]] || [[word:fawofmoj|fawofmoj]] || [[word:fawofmosh|fawofmosh]] || [[word:fawofmof|fawofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fawomotho|fawomotho]] || [[word:fawomojo|fawomojo]] || [[word:fawomosho|fawomosho]] || [[word:fawomoko|fawomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fawomoth|fawomoth]] || [[word:fawomoj|fawomoj]] || [[word:fawomosh|fawomosh]] || [[word:fawomo|fawomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fawomothol|fawomothol]] || [[word:fawomojol|fawomojol]] || [[word:fawomoshol|fawomoshol]] || [[word:fawomokol|fawomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fawomothotho|fawomothotho]] || [[word:fawomojojo|fawomojojo]] || [[word:fawomoshosho|fawomoshosho]] || [[word:fawomoko|fawomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fawomothon|fawomothon]] || [[word:fawomojon|fawomojon]] || [[word:fawomoshon|fawomoshon]] || [[word:fawomokon|fawomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fawomothoro|fawomothoro]] || [[word:fawomojoro|fawomojoro]] || [[word:fawomoshoro|fawomoshoro]] || [[word:fawomokoro|fawomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
